title: Trajectory Definition
description: A Tier 2-4 Cartesian trajectory: an ordered sequence of timestamped end-effector waypoints. Position unit: meter. Time unit: second. Quaternion order: wxyz.

orientation_mode.description: Whether end-effector orientation is held fixed or varies along the trajectory.

closed_path.description: Whether the trajectory returns to its starting pose (closed loop).

duration_s.description: Total nominal duration of the trajectory in seconds.

control_period_s.description: Nominal time step between consecutive waypoints, in seconds.

waypoints.description: Ordered list of waypoints comprising the trajectory.

time_s.description: Timestamp of this waypoint in seconds from trajectory start.

position_m.description: End-effector position [x, y, z] in meters, world frame.

quaternion_wxyz.description: End-effector orientation as a unit quaternion [w, x, y, z] (wxyz order), world frame.
